title: fix: keep model access label near title
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Keeps the `Quest` / `Paid` label directly after the model title.
- Preserves title truncation when the model column is narrow.

gist.headline: Labels Stay With Their Models
gist.blurb: The little Quest and Paid badges have stopped wandering off across the model table. Even in a narrow column, they now stay politely beside the model they describe.
gist.summary: Fixed the model table so Quest and Paid access labels remain directly beside each model title while long titles still truncate in narrow columns.
gist.impact: Users browsing models can now immediately see each model's access type without the label drifting away from its title.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy model-library shelf where Polly, wearing tiny librarian glasses, carefully clips a Quest/Paid badge directly onto a neatly trimmed model-name card. A small code-plant and retro terminal make the interface setting feel alive; the visual metaphor is labels staying attached to their proper titles.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot wearing tiny librarian glasses, pinning a small pixel badge labeled "QUEST" beside a neatly shortened model-name card on a glowing retro computer table; include code-plants, tiny flowers, and a warm lime green (#ecf874) monitor glow. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, with dark purple (#110518) outlines and a calm organized library feeling.
